name: Full Feature Audit — Release Readiness
description: Deep code review + staging API testing of all 86 features. Checking security, bugs, scalability, and identifying improvements to produce a release-readiness roadmap.

severityLevels.P0: Security vulnerability, data leak, auth bypass — must fix before release
severityLevels.P1: Broken functionality, missing error handling, data integrity risk
severityLevels.P2: Performance issue, inconsistent patterns, missing validation
severityLevels.P3: Code quality, naming, minor UX improvements

stories.title: Audit: AI Company Research
acceptance: API key not exposed in frontend

stories.title: Audit: HITL Follow-Up Email (Send as Rep)
Audit: Smart Action Item Extraction
acceptance: Task creation flows to correct user

stories.title: Audit: Ask AI About Any Meeting
acceptance: User can only query own meetings

stories.title: Audit: Email Action Centre
acceptance: No VITE_AWS keys used for send

stories.title: Audit: Agent Marketplace + Custom SOPs + Playbooks
acceptance: No code injection via custom skills

stories.title: Audit: Visual Workflow Builder
acceptance: No code injection via NL workflows

stories.title: Audit: Configurable AI Models + Email Signal Intelligence
Audit: Global Smart Search + Quick Add
Audit: Public Roadmap & Voting
acceptance: Public access doesn't leak private data

stories.title: Audit: Scheduled Jobs (Cron)
acceptance: All crons have auth (cron secret or service_role)

stories.title: Audit: Frontend Security (VITE_ keys, CORS, service role)
